title: Better Deep Dark
description: An expanded and improved Deep Dark, craft powerful tools and Echo armor.
body:
<center>

![Better Deep Dark](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/IO0rG794/images/7cd38e9a6785eda98a7a413bc142192d686a8474.png)

</center>

**Explore the depths of the ancient cities with Better Deep Dark.** Fight the Warden, a powerful creature guarding mysterious soul pieces. Collect them to craft Dark Ingots and create Deep Dark tools and Echo armor.
[Check out the gallery to see more](https://modrinth.com/project/better-deep-dark/gallery).

### ⚔️ More Tools & Armor
- Discover the ultimate power of Deep Dark tools, netherite tools are now history. Experience the fastest and most durable tools in the game. Prepare to equip yourself with Echo equipment, the strongest armor the world has ever seen.

### 🏆 Defeat The Warden
- The Warden now drops even more valuable items. Obtain the Warden's Horn, Soul Pieces, Echo Stones, and exclusive Deep Dark tools.

[![Saving for a laptop!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/9rlXSyLg/images/491c87c96cd602ec45774ce0b0cb9fe4d25ba074.png)](https://paypal.me/kevgelhorn)
